description_long: This is a luxurious, high-backed armchair upholstered in deep blue fabric with a quilted diamond pattern and gold button tufting. The chair features prominent winged sides and thick, padded armrests, providing both comfort and a classic silhouette. The seat and backrest are generously cushioned, with the backrest extending high above the head for added support. The armchair stands on four short, ornately carved wooden legs with a dark finish, giving it a traditional and elegant appearance. The upholstery appears soft and plush, with subtle horizontal striping visible in the fabric texture. This armchair would be a striking and comfortable addition to a public lounge, upscale waiting area, or urban park pavilion.
description: A plush, high-backed blue armchair with diamond-tufted upholstery, winged sides, and carved wooden legs. The chair exudes classic elegance and comfort.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high, winged backrest, padded armrests, and diamond-tufted seat with gold buttons.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the profile of the winged backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, rounded back and the continuation of the blue quilted upholstery.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest, seat depth, and the elegant curve of the backrest.
attribute_armrest_design: padded and upholstered, straight and thick
attribute_backrest_style: high and winged, diamond-tufted with gold buttons
attribute_upholstery_pattern: quilted diamond with subtle horizontal striping
